title: Nimai Technologies — AI EdTech Corporate Website

requirements.summary: Implement sticky glassmorphism header navigation with mobile hamburger menu
acceptanceCriteria: Header remains fixed at the top while scrolling on all screen sizes
Navigation links smooth-scroll to the corresponding section
Hamburger menu appears on screens below 768px and toggles a mobile nav drawer
Header uses glassmorphism backdrop-filter with blue/indigo gradient tones

file_operations.description: Create sticky header component with Nimai Technologies branding on the left and navigation links (Home, About, Services, Why Choose Us, Contact) on the right. Implement smooth-scroll behavior for navigation links. Include hamburger menu toggle for mobile viewports below 768px. Apply glassmorphism styling with backdrop-filter, semi-transparent background, and corporate blue/indigo gradient tones.

Create mobile navigation drawer component that slides in from the side when hamburger menu is clicked. Include the same navigation links as desktop header with smooth-scroll behavior. Add close button and overlay backdrop. Style consistently with glassmorphism theme.
Import and render Header component at the top of the application layout. Ensure it remains fixed during scroll across all sections.
Add global smooth-scroll behavior (scroll-behavior: smooth) and define CSS custom properties for corporate blue (#1E3A8A) and deep indigo (#312E81, #4F46E5) gradient palette.

requirements.summary: Build Hero section with headline, subheading, CTAs, and animated tech background
acceptanceCriteria: H1 text matches exactly: 'Revolutionizing Institutional Intelligence with AI'
Subheading text is present and readable on all screen sizes
Primary CTA scrolls to the Contact section
Secondary CTA opens WhatsApp with the pre-filled message
Background animation runs smoothly without causing layout shift

file_operations.description: Create Hero section component with H1 headline 'Revolutionizing Institutional Intelligence with AI', subheading 'Empowering Business Schools & Agencies with Smart Automation & Predictive Intelligence', primary CTA button 'Request Institutional Demo' that smooth-scrolls to Contact section, and secondary CTA button 'Talk to Our AI Experts' linking to WhatsApp (https://wa.me/91XXXXXXXXXX?text=Hello%20Nimai%20Technologies%2C%20I%20would%20like%20to%20talk%20to%20your%20AI%20Experts.). Set background to use the generated hero background image from frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png with subtle gradient overlay. Add CSS animation for smooth fade-in entrance.
Import and render Hero component immediately after Header in the main application layout.

requirements.summary: Build About Us section with domain expertise content and three highlight cards
acceptanceCriteria: Section has proper H2 heading matching the specified title
All five content themes (expertise, transformation, security, ethics, vision) are addressed in the copy
Three cards for Innovation, Security, and Institutional Growth are displayed in a responsive grid
Cards have icons, titles, and short descriptions

file_operations.description: Create About Us section with H2 title 'Bridging Traditional Pedagogy with Cutting-Edge AI'. Include descriptive paragraphs covering domain expertise in education & institutional consulting, AI-driven transformation, secure data architecture, ethical AI compliance, and vision statement about reducing administrative burden. Display three highlight cards in a responsive grid (1 column mobile, 3 columns desktop) labeled 'Innovation', 'Security', and 'Institutional Growth', each with an icon and short description. Apply glassmorphism card styling.
Import and render About component after Hero section with proper section ID 'about' for navigation anchor.

requirements.summary: Build Services section with five service cards and WhatsApp CTAs
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 service cards are rendered with title, description, and CTA button
Each CTA button opens a WhatsApp link with the correct pre-filled message substituting the actual service name
Cards display in a responsive grid (1 column mobile, 2–3 columns desktop)
Service names match the specified list exactly

file_operations.description: Create Services section with H2 title 'Our Services'. Display 5 service cards in a responsive grid (1 column mobile, 2-3 columns desktop): (1) Custom LLM Integration for Institutions, (2) Admission Automation & Smart Application Filtering, (3) Predictive Analytics for Student Success, (4) AI-powered Academic Intelligence Dashboard, (5) Data Security & Compliance Architecture. Each card includes title, short description, and CTA button that opens WhatsApp link (https://wa.me/91XXXXXXXXXX) with pre-filled message format: 'Hello Nimai Technologies, I am interested in [Service Name]. Please share more details.' Apply glassmorphism card styling with hover lift animations.
Import and render Services component after About section with proper section ID 'services' for navigation anchor.

requirements.summary: Build Why Choose Us section with five feature highlight cards
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 feature highlights are rendered with icon, title, and description
Section has a clear H2 heading
Layout is responsive across mobile and desktop

file_operations.description: Create Why Choose Us section with H2 title 'Why Choose Nimai Technologies'. Display 5 feature highlights in a responsive grid (1 column mobile, 2-3 columns desktop): (1) Reduced Administrative Workload, (2) AI-Driven Decision Making, (3) Secure Infrastructure, (4) Future-Proof Technology, (5) Scalable Institutional Solutions. Each card includes an icon, title, and short description. Apply glassmorphism card styling with hover animations.
Import and render WhyChooseUs component after Services section with proper section ID 'why-choose-us' for navigation anchor.

requirements.summary: Build Contact section with form that redirects to WhatsApp with auto-filled message
acceptanceCriteria: Form renders all 5 fields: Institution Name, Contact Person, Email, Phone, Message
On submit, a WhatsApp URL is constructed with all field values included in the message text
User is redirected to the WhatsApp link on submission
Basic client-side validation prevents submission with empty required fields

file_operations.description: Create Contact section with H2 title 'Get In Touch'. Include a form with fields: Institution Name, Contact Person, Email, Phone, and Message. Implement client-side validation to ensure all required fields are filled. On form submission, construct a WhatsApp URL (https://wa.me/91XXXXXXXXXX) with all form field values formatted into the message text, then redirect user to that URL. Include a direct WhatsApp CTA button on the page. Apply glassmorphism styling to form container.
Import and render Contact component after WhyChooseUs section with proper section ID 'contact' for navigation anchor.

requirements.summary: Build footer with company info, navigation links, and create privacy/terms stub pages
acceptanceCriteria: Footer contains company name, two link columns, WhatsApp button, and copyright line
Privacy Policy and Terms & Conditions links are present and navigate to their respective stub pages
Stub pages include placeholder content and a back/home navigation link
Footer is responsive and stacks columns on mobile

file_operations.description: Create Footer component with Nimai Technologies Private Limited company name, Quick Links column (Home, About, Services, Why Choose Us, Contact), Services Links column listing all 5 services, WhatsApp contact button (https://wa.me/91XXXXXXXXXX), copyright notice, and links to Privacy Policy and Terms & Conditions pages. Use responsive layout that stacks columns on mobile. Apply glassmorphism styling consistent with site theme.
Create Privacy Policy stub page with placeholder legal text, H1 heading 'Privacy Policy', and navigation link back to home. Apply consistent site styling.
Create Terms & Conditions stub page with placeholder legal text, H1 heading 'Terms & Conditions', and navigation link back to home. Apply consistent site styling.
Import and render Footer component at the bottom of the application layout. Set up React Router routes for /privacy-policy and /terms-and-conditions pages.

requirements.summary: Implement comprehensive SEO setup with meta tags, schema markup, and site files
acceptanceCriteria: Meta title and description are present in the HTML head
Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags are present
JSON-LD Organization schema is embedded in a <script type='application/ld+json'> block
Headings follow a logical H1 > H2 > H3 hierarchy with no skipped levels
sitemap.xml and robots.txt files are present in the public directory
A favicon is linked in the HTML head

file_operations.description: Add comprehensive SEO meta tags to HTML head: meta title 'Nimai Technologies | AI-Powered Institutional Intelligence Platform', meta description targeting keywords (AI for Business Schools, Institutional AI Platform, Education AI Automation, AI Admission System, Academic Predictive Analytics), Open Graph tags (og:title, og:description, og:type, og:url, og:image), Twitter Card meta tags, and favicon link. Embed JSON-LD Organization schema markup in a script tag.
Generate sitemap.xml listing all main pages (homepage, privacy-policy, terms-and-conditions) with proper XML structure and URLs.
Create robots.txt file allowing all user agents to crawl the site and referencing the sitemap location.
Add a favicon file (can be a simple blue/indigo colored icon representing Nimai Technologies).

requirements.summary: Apply cohesive visual design system with blue/indigo gradient theme and animations
acceptanceCriteria: Blue and indigo gradient palette is applied consistently across the site
Cards use glassmorphism styling with visible backdrop-filter or semi-transparent backgrounds
Smooth scroll is enabled site-wide
Cards and buttons have visible hover animations
Typography is clean, professional, and readable at all breakpoints

file_operations.description: Implement cohesive design system: define CSS custom properties for corporate blue (#1E3A8A range) and deep indigo (#312E81, #4F46E5 range) gradient theme. Add global styles for smooth scroll behavior. Define reusable glassmorphism card classes with backdrop-filter, frosted glass effect, and semi-transparent backgrounds. Add CSS animations for fade-in, slide-up entrance effects, and hover lift animations for cards and buttons. Set up professional sans-serif typography (Inter or system font stack) with consistent spacing variables.

Extend Tailwind configuration with custom color palette for corporate blue and deep indigo shades. Add custom animation utilities for entrance effects (fade-in, slide-up) and hover animations. Configure backdrop-blur utilities for glassmorphism effects.

requirements.summary: Wire generated hero background image into Hero section as static asset
acceptanceCriteria: Hero background image is referenced as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/
Image renders without distortion at full viewport width on both desktop and mobile

file_operations.description: Update Hero component to reference the generated hero background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png as the section background. Apply CSS properties to ensure image covers full width without distortion (background-size: cover, background-position: center). Layer a subtle gradient overlay on top for text readability.
